steps.title: Set each factor to zero
steps.content: An $x$-intercept occurs where $f(x)=0$. Since the function is already factored, set each factor equal to $0$.

steps.title: Pick the missing intercept
steps.content: The point $(-\frac{3}{4},0)$ is not in that list, so it is not an $x$-intercept of the graph. The answer is B.
